import subprocess

text = 'Test LinkedIn post - clipboard kaam kar raha hai!'

subprocess.run\(['powershell', '-Command', f\\"Get-Content '{tmp}' -Raw | Set-Clipboard\\"], check=True, capture_output=True, timeout=10\)
tmp.unlink\(\)
print\('Clipboard mein copy ho gaya! Ctrl+V se check karo.'\)
" 2>&1)
